title: The fate of odd-parity magnetism in one dimension
abstract: We consider a one-dimensional model for a $p$-wave magnet within the bosonization framework. The model consists of itinerant electrons described by an extended Hubbard model coupled to a chain of localized moments through the Kondo exchange. The classical ground state of the local-moment system captures the salient features of an odd-parity magnet. By bosonizing the coupled system, a description in terms of coupled Luttinger liquids follows, giving rise to a rich weak-coupling phase diagram. It is shown that the spin chain develops quasi long-range order consistent with the combined time-reversal and translation symmetry defining the $p$-wave magnet. We highlight the peculiar role played by this order in establishing a commensurability condition on the electronic filling under which additional interactions appear in the bosonic field theory. It is demonstrated that these interactions endow the electron spectral function with a pronounced $p$-wave character. Away from commensurate filling, these interactions are rendered irrelevant and the ensuing $p$-wave character is lost.
summary: 我们考虑玻色化框架内 $p$ 波磁体的一维模型。该模型由扩展哈伯德模型描述的流动电子组成，通过近藤交换耦合到一系列局部矩。局部矩系统的经典基态捕捉了奇宇称磁体的显着特征。通过对耦合系统进行玻色化，可以得到耦合路廷格液体的描述，从而产生丰富的弱耦合相图。结果表明，自旋链发展出与定义$p$波磁体的时间反转和平移对称性相结合的准长程有序。我们强调了该顺序在建立电子填充的可通约条件中所发挥的特殊作用，在该条件下，玻色子场理论中出现了额外的相互作用。结果表明，这些相互作用赋予电子谱函数明显的 $p$ 波特征。如果没有相应的填充，这些相互作用就会变得无关紧要，随后的 $p$ 波特征就会丢失。

title: The odd fermion at the edge: odd-even staggering in the trapped, unitary Fermi gas
abstract: We investigate the odd-even staggering in the harmonically-trapped unitary Fermi gas at large particle-number charge $Q$. Using both a large-$N$ BdG description and a complementary large-charge EFT method, we show that for odd particle number the extra fermion forms an edge-localized quasiparticle near the Thomas-Fermi surface rather than a bulk excitation. In the edge limit, the microscopic BdG problem reduces to a universal coupled Airy system whose lowest positive eigenvalue fixes the leading odd-even splitting energy, $\chi\,\xi^{1/6}(24Q)^{1/9}\,\hbar\omega + \cdots$ where $\xi$ is the Bertsch parameter, and $\chi$ is a universal edge coefficient. The associated EFT describes a fermionic mode confined to the boundary and coupled to the superfluid Goldstone field, reproducing the same $Q$ scaling while introducing a dependence on two low-energy constants. Finally, we numerically compute the spectrum and confirm the predicted scaling and localization properties.
summary: 我们研究了大粒子数电荷 $Q$ 下谐波俘获的酉费米气体中的奇偶交错。使用大$N$ BdG 描述和互补的大电荷 EFT 方法，我们表明，对于奇数粒子数，额外的费米子在托马斯-费米表面附近形成边缘局域准粒子，而不是体激发。在边缘极限下，微观 BdG 问题简化为通用耦合艾里系统，其最低正特征值固定领先的奇偶分裂能量 $\chi\,\xi^{1/6}(24Q)^{1/9}\,\hbar\omega + \cdots$，其中 $\xi$ 是 Bertsch 参数，$\chi$ 是通用边缘系数。相关的 EFT 描述了限制在边界内并耦合到超流体戈德斯通场的费米子模式，再现了相同的 $Q$ 缩放，同时引入了对两个低能量常数的依赖。最后，我们对频谱进行数值计算并确认预测的缩放和定位属性。

title: Odd Diffusion in Three-Dimensional Isotropic Media
abstract: Odd diffusion is a hallmark of chiral active matter, generating currents transverse to density gradients. Existing theories rely on a linear antisymmetric transport coefficient that exists only in two dimensions, raising the question of whether odd diffusion can occur in isotropic three-dimensional systems. Here we show that such transport is possible through a nonlinear constitutive law. Symmetry considerations reveal that the three-dimensional Levi-Civita tensor permits a leading order isotropic odd current at second order in the density gradient expansion and only in multicomponent systems. The resulting transport generates boundary-driven rotational currents, finite vorticity, and enstrophy despite the absence of external torques or preferred directions. We show how such a constitutive law derives from a microscopic model of particles interacting through nonreciprocal three-body forces using the Dean--Kawasaki coarse-graining procedure. These results establish a minimal framework for odd transport in isotropic three dimensions.
summary: 奇扩散是手性活性物质的标志，产生横向于密度梯度的电流。现有理论依赖于仅存在于二维中的线性反对称输运系数，这就提出了奇扩散是否可以在各向同性三维系统中发生的问题。在这里，我们证明这种传输通过非线性本构定律是可能的。对称性考虑表明，三维 Levi-Civita 张量仅在多组分系统中允许密度梯度展开中的二阶前导各向同性奇电流。尽管没有外部扭矩或首选方向，由此产生的传输仍会产生边界驱动的旋转电流、有限涡度和熵。我们展示了如何使用 Dean-Kawasaki 粗粒度程序从通过非互易三体力相互作用的粒子微观模型推导出这样的本构定律。这些结果建立了各向同性三维中奇数传输的最小框架。

title: Fluctuation-Induced Magnetoelectric Effect in Noncentrosymmetric Superconductors
abstract: We study the effect of superconducting fluctuations on the spin susceptibility and NMR relaxation rate in noncentrosymmetric two-dimensional materials above the superconducting transition temperature, considering arbitrary strength of impurity scattering. Employing a microscopic model with linear Rashba spin-orbit coupling, we show that superconducting fluctuations give rise to a direct contribution to the spin susceptibility through fluctuation-induced Cooper pairs. This fluctuation-driven magnetoelectric effect is possible even for purely $s$-wave singlet pairing, a mechanism that is forbidden in centrosymmetric systems. It competes with the reduction of the susceptibility below the Pauli value arising from the combined effects of the suppression of the density of states and quantum-interference localization processes. In contrast, superconducting fluctuations enhance the NMR relaxation rate above its normal-state Korringa value, with spin-orbit coupling providing an additional amplification of this effect.
summary: 我们研究了超导涨落对超导转变温度以上非中心对称二维材料的自旋磁化率和核磁共振弛豫率的影响，考虑了任意的杂质散射强度。采用线性 Rashba 自旋轨道耦合的微观模型，我们表明超导涨落通过涨落引起的库珀对对自旋磁化率产生直接贡献。这种波动驱动的磁电效应甚至对于纯粹的$s$波单重态配对也是可能的，这是中心对称系统中禁止的机制。它与由于抑制态密度和量子干涉局域化过程的综合效应而导致的磁化率降低到泡利值以下相竞争。相比之下，超导波动将核磁共振弛豫率提高到其正常状态科林加值以上，而自旋轨道耦合则进一步放大了这种效应。

title: Challenging the $p$-type Paradigm: Intrinsic $n$-type Mobility in Antiferromagnetic Cr$_2$O$_3$
abstract: Chromium oxide (Cr$_2$O$_3$) is widely considered a $p$-type transparent conducting oxide despite ongoing debate regarding its intrinsic transport character. Here, we resolve this question by computing phonon-limited electron and hole mobilities using the ab initio Boltzmann transport equation. We find that electron mobility systematically exceeds hole mobility over a wide temperature range, demonstrating that Cr$_2$O$_3$ is intrinsically $n$-type. Analysis of scattering mechanisms reveals that scattering with phonons affects electrons and holes similarly, and that the mobility asymmetry originates from the electronic structure, namely the larger effective mass and multi-valley character of the valence band. The intrinsic $n$-type character, combined with moderate hole mobility, enables bipolar transport and revises the role of Cr$_2$O$_3$ in transparent electronics. Additionally, our results on mobility complement previous studies on defect formation indicating that the commonly observed $p$-type behavior is extrinsic. These insights provide a complete chemical-transport paradigm for Cr$_2$O$_3$, re-evaluating its role in functional transparent electronic and magneto-optoelectronic applications
summary:
氧化铬 (Cr$_2$O$_3$) 被广泛认为是 $p$ 型透明导电氧化物，尽管关于其固有传输特性的争论仍在继续。在这里，我们通过使用从头算的玻尔兹曼输运方程计算声子限制的电子和空穴迁移率来解决这个问题。我们发现电子迁移率在很宽的温度范围内系统地超过空穴迁移率，证明 Cr$_2$O$_3$ 本质上是 $n$ 型。散射机制的分析表明，声子散射对电子和空穴的影响类似，迁移率不对称源于电子结构，即价带的较大有效质量和多谷特性。固有的 $n$ 型特征与适度的空穴迁移率相结合，可实现双极传输并修正 Cr$_2$O$_3$ 在透明电子器件中的作用。此外，我们的迁移率结果补充了之前关于缺陷形成的研究，表明常见的 $p$ 型行为是外在的。

这些见解为 Cr$_2$O$_3$ 提供了完整的化学传输范例，重新评估了其在功能性透明电子和磁光电子应用中的作用

title: Topological phase transition driven by in-plane spin rotation
abstract: The intrinsic coupling between magnetism and nontrivial band topology in magnetic topological insulators makes external magnetic fields a powerful tool for manipulating topological states. However, conventional magnetic control mechanisms, such as driving magnetic phase transitions or fully reversing magnetization, typically demand large magnetic fields and lack continuous tunability. Here, we establish a symmetry framework for the reversible switching of topological states via continuous in-plane spin rotation, governed by magnetic point group constraints on the Berry curvature distribution. Using a two-dimensional kagome ferromagnetic Chern insulator as a prototype, we demonstrate that a 60°in-plane magnetization rotation reverses the sign of the Chern number, transitioning through a topologically trivial state. Crucially, micromagnetic simulations confirm that this spin-reorientation-driven switching operates under exceptionally small magnetic fields and on ultrafast timescales. This work provides a highly efficient, low-energy paradigm for the manipulation of topological states.
summary: 磁拓扑绝缘体中磁性和非平凡能带拓扑之间的内在耦合使得外部磁场成为操纵拓扑状态的有力工具。然而，传统的磁控制机制，例如驱动磁相变或完全反转磁化，通常需要大磁场并且缺乏连续可调性。在这里，我们建立了一个对称框架，通过连续的面内自旋旋转实现拓扑状态的可逆切换，受贝里曲率分布的磁点群约束控制。使用二维 kagome 铁磁陈绝缘体作为原型，我们证明了 60° 面内磁化旋转会反转陈数的符号，从而转变为拓扑平凡状态。至关重要的是，微磁模拟证实，这种自旋重定向驱动的开关在极小的磁场和超快的时间尺度下运行。这项工作为拓扑状态的操纵提供了一种高效、低能量的范例。

title: Dynamic heterogeneity in sodium silicate melts via machine-learning potential
abstract: We present a comprehensive characterisation of dynamic heterogeneity in sodium silicate melts using molecular dynamics simulation with machine-learning potentials. By studying sodium disilicate, tetrasilicate, and hexasilicate melts across a range of temperatures, mean squared displacement and a time-correlation function computed up to the nanosecond timescale provide a detailed account of how spatial mobility disparities emerge in a realistic multicomponent oxide glass. Within these timescales, the self-part of the van Hove function for sodium displays a bimodality, demonstrating that alkali transport is mediated by discrete displacement events consistent with a hopping mechanism. This distinct hopping allows sodium ions to decouple from the sluggish relaxation of the silicate matrix. Furthermore, evaluation of the non-Gaussian parameter reveals that, although all constituent species exhibit dynamic heterogeneity, the non-Gaussian behaviour is most pronounced for oxygen atoms. This trend reflects the intermittency of structural rearrangements, where framework atoms undergo rare and stochastic events compared to the frequent displacements of mobile ions. Our findings elucidate the microscopic mechanism of ion transport and its connection to dynamic heterogeneity in silicate melts, offering a new avenue to study fundamental glassy physics in realistic vitreous materials.
summary:
我们利用具有机器学习潜力的分子动力学模拟，对硅酸钠熔体的动态非均质性进行了全面表征。通过研究二硅酸钠、四硅酸钠和六硅酸钠在一定温度范围内的熔体，均方位移和计算到纳秒时间尺度的时间相关函数，详细说明了现实多组分氧化物玻璃中如何出现空间迁移率差异。在这些时间尺度内，钠的范霍夫函数的自部分表现出双峰性，表明碱运输是由与跳跃机制一致的离散位移事件介导的。这种独特的跳跃使得钠离子能够从硅酸盐基质的缓慢松弛中解耦。此外，非高斯参数的评估表明，尽管所有组成物种都表现出动态异质性，但氧原子的非高斯行为最为明显。这种趋势反映了结构重排的间歇性，其中与移动离子的频繁位移相比，框架原子经历罕见和随机的事件。

我们的研究结果阐明了离子输运的微观机制及其与硅酸盐熔体动态异质性的联系，为研究现实玻璃材料中的基础玻璃物理提供了新途径。

title: Preconditioning Magnetic Systems in Kohn-Sham Density Functional Theory
abstract: The convergence of the self-consistent field iterations in Kohn-Sham density functional theory can be significantly hindered by the presence of small eigenvalues in the dielectric matrix, which are often associated with electronic phase transitions in magnetic systems. In this work, we study this type of convergence issues and propose a new preconditioning scheme to mitigate them. Our preconditioning scheme is inspired by the Stoner model and based on a non-interacting susceptibility that neglects orbital variations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on a range of ferromagnetic systems, showing that it can significantly reduce the number of iterations required to achieve convergence in the vicinity of magnetic phase transitions.
summary: Kohn-Sham 密度泛函理论中自洽场迭代的收敛可能会因介电基体中小特征值的存在而受到严重阻碍，这些特征值通常与磁系统中的电子相变相关。在这项工作中，我们研究了此类收敛问题，并提出了一种新的预处理方案来缓解这些问题。我们的预处理方案受到斯托纳模型的启发，并基于忽略轨道变化的非相互作用磁化率。我们证明了我们的方法在一系列铁磁系统上的有效性，表明它可以显着减少在磁相变附近实现收敛所需的迭代次数。

title: Quasiclassical theory of nonlinear response in d-wave superconductors
abstract: We use a self-consistent Keldysh--Nambu quasiclassical theory to study two related nonlinear phenomena in clean d-wave superconductors: the photo-induced static correction to the order parameter -- the Eliashberg effect -- and third-harmonic generation. Both follow from a systematic perturbative solution of the out-of-equilibrium Eilenberger equation for the Keldysh propagator. For the steady-state correction to the pairing amplitude we find that at temperatures close to the critical temperature and to leading order in the gap magnitude $\Delta$, the photo-induced change of the order parameter is zero at all drive frequencies: in contrast to s-wave superconductors, a clean d-wave superconductor exhibits no Eliashberg enhancement at this order. The gap-enhancing quasiparticle-redistribution channel that drives the effect in the s-wave case is suppressed by an additional power of $\Delta$ in the d-wave case. For third-harmonic generation we find that the charge-density-fluctuation (particle--hole) channel significantly dominates the Schmid--Higgs amplitude-mode contribution over a broad frequency range, the two becoming comparable only in a narrow window near the resonance frequency $\omega\approx 2\sqrt{2}\,\Delta$ if one neglects the diamagnetic part of the current in the normal state. We trace this to the nonequilibrium dynamics of nodal quasiparticles, which must be retained explicitly and which also makes the response sensitive to the orientation of the driving field.
summary:
我们使用自洽的 Keldysh-Nambu 准经典理论来研究干净 d 波超导体中的两个相关非线性现象：序参数的光致静态校正（Eliashberg 效应）和三次谐波产生。两者都源自凯尔迪什传播器的非平衡 Eilenberger 方程的系统微扰解。对于配对振幅的稳态校正，我们发现在接近临界温度和间隙幅度 $\Delta$ 中的前导阶的温度下，光致的阶次参数变化在所有驱动频率下为零：与 s 波超导体相比，干净的 d 波超导体在此阶上没有表现出 Eliashberg 增强。在 s 波情况下驱动效应的间隙增强准粒子重新分布通道在 d 波情况下被附加功率 $\Delta$ 抑制。

对于三次谐波的产生，我们发现电荷密度涨落（粒子-空穴）通道在较宽的频率范围内显着主导施密德-希格斯振幅模式贡献，如果忽略正常状态下电流的抗磁部分，则两者仅在谐振频率 $\omega\approx 2\sqrt{2}\,\Delta$ 附近的窄窗口中具有可比性。我们将其追溯到节点准粒子的非平衡动力学，它必须明确保留，并且也使得响应对驱动场的方向敏感。

title: Physical Neural Networks Need Nonlinearity, Amplification, and Suppression for Learning
abstract: The exponential growth in energy consumption of artificial intelligence systems has spurred interest in physical computing paradigms that exploit the relaxation of physical systems toward steady states. However, many existing physical networks are fundamentally linear and incapable of performing nonlinear operations crucial for meaningful machine learning tasks. Here we use simulations to show that nonlinearity alone is insufficient; physical learning systems must also support signal amplification and suppression to perform nontrivial computations. We present physically plausible circuit designs that incorporate these essential features, enabling effective nonlinear information processing. Our findings clarify the limitations of linear physical networks and provide guidance for developing energy-efficient physical learning architectures capable of general machine learning tasks.
summary: 人工智能系统能耗的指数级增长激发了人们对利用物理系统向稳态松弛的物理计算范式的兴趣。然而，许多现有的物理网络基本上是线性的，无法执行对于有意义的机器学习任务至关重要的非线性操作。在这里，我们通过模拟来证明仅靠非线性是不够的；物理学习系统还必须支持信号放大和抑制以执行重要的计算。我们提出了物理上合理的电路设计，其中结合了这些基本特征，从而实现了有效的非线性信息处理。我们的研究结果阐明了线性物理网络的局限性，并为开发能够执行一般机器学习任务的节能物理学习架构提供了指导。

title: Odd transport in a two-temperature Brownian dimer
abstract: We investigate a two-temperature Brownian dimer with odd mobility, characterized by antisymmetric transport coefficients, as a controlled paradigm for odd nonequilibrium dynamics. The system is made of two harmonically confined particles coupled by an elastic spring and connected to reservoirs at different temperatures. Odd mobility converts conservative forces into transverse motion, linking heat exchange to circulating probability currents without requiring external torques, spatial anisotropy, or nonconservative driving. Our exact solution shows that odd mobility creates handed correlations between the two particles while leaving the individual particle distributions isotropic. These correlations arise only when temperature imbalance, elastic coupling, and odd mobility act together, and their handedness reverses when the odd response is reversed. The steady probability current contains two distinct parts: the ordinary irreversible current of a two-temperature dimer and an additional handed contribution generated by odd mobility. When projected onto the motion of each particle, this handed contribution becomes a pair of counter-rotating circulating currents inside the traps. Based on the currents we compute the heat transfer and entropy production analytically. We show that odd mobility enhances thermal conductance between the reservoirs, while the net heat current and total dissipation remain unchanged under reversal of the odd handedness.
summary:
我们研究了具有奇迁移率的双温布朗二聚体，其特征是反对称输运系数，作为奇非平衡动力学的受控范例。该系统由两个和谐约束的粒子组成，通过弹性弹簧耦合，并连接到不同温度的储层。奇数移动性将保守力转化为横向运动，将热交换与循环概率流联系起来，而不需要外部扭矩、空间各向异性或非保守驱动。我们的精确解表明，奇数迁移率在两个粒子之间产生了手相关性，同时使各个粒子分布各向同性。仅当温度不平衡、弹性耦合和奇数迁移率共同作用时，这些相关性才会出现，并且当奇数响应反转时，它们的旋向性也会反转。稳定概率电流包含两个不同的部分：双温度二聚体的普通不可逆电流和由奇迁移率产生的附加手性贡献。当投射到每个粒子的运动上时，这种手性贡献就变成了陷阱内的一对反向旋转的循环电流。

根据电流，我们分析计算传热和熵产生。我们表明，奇数流动性增强了储层之间的热导，而净热流和总耗散在奇数旋性反转的情况下保持不变。

title: Low-energy model for doped graphene nanoribbons
abstract: We analyse in this article the many-body behavior of free-standing doped graphene nanoribbons where the chemical potential lies inside the bulk single-particle bands. We perform an exact mapping from both an extended and an on-site Hubbard model of the ribbons to a Kanamori model, which includes ferromagnetic exchange and pair-hopping interactions. We determine the resulting Coulomb matrix elements analytically, and identify their scaling behavior as a function of ribbon width and length. We propose a low-energy version of the Kanamori Hamiltonian to address the response of the ribbons to external fields, with a view to their use as transport channels in nanoelectronics. We find that the model and the proposed ribbon parameters can produce open-shell, high-spin many-body states that can lead to shell- and spin-blockade responses.
summary: 我们在本文中分析了独立式掺杂石墨烯纳米带的多体行为，其中化学势位于块状单粒子带内。我们执行从带的扩展和现场哈伯德模型到 Kanamori 模型的精确映射，其中包括铁磁交换和配对跳跃相互作用。我们通过分析确定所得的库仑矩阵元素，并将其缩放行为确定为带宽度和长度的函数。我们提出了一种低能量版本的金森哈密顿量，以解决带对外部场的响应，以期将其用作纳米电子学中的传输通道。我们发现该模型和提出的带参数可以产生开壳层、高自旋多体态，从而导致壳层和自旋封锁响应。

title: Connection between the GKSL master equation and the Landauer formula
abstract: We derive a current formula within the Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) master equation formalism for a non-interacting system, and identify the conditions under which it reduces to the Landauer formula.
summary: 我们推导了非相互作用系统的 Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) 主方程形式中的当前公式，并确定了将其简化为 Landauer 公式的条件。

title: Unraveling Internal Friction in a Coarse-Grained Protein Model
abstract: Understanding the dynamic behavior of complex biomolecules requires simplified models that not only make computations feasible but also reveal fundamental mechanisms. Coarse-graining (CG) achieves this by grouping atoms into beads, whose stochastic dynamics can be derived using the Mori-Zwanzig formalism, capturing both reversible and irreversible interactions. In liquid, the dissipative bead-bead interactions have so far been restricted to hydrodynamic couplings. However, friction does not only arises from the solvent but notably, from the internal degrees of freedom missing in the CG beads. This leads to an additional ''internal friction'' whose relevance is studied in this contribution. By comparing with all-atom molecular dynamics (MD), we neatly show that in order to accurately reproduce the dynamics of a globular protein in water using a coarse-grained (CG) model, not only a precise determination of elastic couplings and the Stokesian self-friction of each bead is required. Critically, the inclusion of internal friction between beads is also necessary for a faithful representation of protein dynamics. We propose to optimize the parameters of the CG model through a self-averaging method that integrates the CG dynamics with an evolution equation for the CG parameters. This approach ensures that selected quantities, such as the radial distribution function and the time correlation of bead velocities, match the corresponding MD values.
summary:
了解复杂生物分子的动态行为需要简化的模型，这不仅使计算变得可行，而且揭示了基本机制。粗粒度（CG）通过将原子分组为珠子来实现这一点，其随机动力学可以使用 Mori-Zwanzig 形式主义导出，捕获可逆和不可逆的相互作用。在液体中，耗散珠-珠相互作用迄今为止仅限于流体动力耦合。然而，摩擦不仅由溶剂产生，而且值得注意的是 CG 珠子中缺少的内部自由度。这导致了额外的“内部摩擦”，本文研究了其相关性。通过与全原子分子动力学（MD）进行比较，我们巧妙地表明，为了使用粗粒度（CG）模型准确地再现水中球状蛋白质的动力学，不仅需要精确确定弹性耦合和每个珠子的斯托克斯自摩擦力。至关重要的是，珠子之间的内摩擦力对于忠实地表达蛋白质动力学也是必要的。

我们建议通过自平均方法来优化 CG 模型的参数，该方法将 CG 动力学与 CG 参数的演化方程相结合。这种方法确保选定的量（例如珠速度的径向分布函数和时间相关性）与相应的 MD 值匹配。

title: An integrable approach to macroscopic fluctuation theory for the multispecies SSEP
abstract: We study the macroscopic fluctuation theory (MFT) of a multispecies generalization of the symmetric simple exclusion process (mSSEP) on the infinite line, in which particles of $N+1$ species -- including, possibly, a vacancy species -- exchange positions at unit rate. Working with the full, redundant set of coarse-grained densities $\bfrho=\{\rho_0,\dots,\rho_N\}$ keeps the relabelling symmetry of the model manifest throughout. We first extend the argument of Derrida and Gerschenfeld to the multispecies setting, showing that the cumulant generating function of the multispecies current between two regions of an arbitrary graph depends on the boundary densities $ \bfrho_L,\bfrho_R$ and on the fugacities $\bflambda$ only through a single scalar variable $\omega$. We then formulate the MFT saddle-point equations for the mSSEP on the infinite line and show that they define an integrable system: they are of Landau--Lifshitz type, and a Zakharov--Takhtajan gauge transformation recasts them in AKNS form. Solving the resulting linear scattering problem by the inverse scattering method, we recover the cumulant generating function $F(\omega)$ for the multispecies current, as well as the initial and final density profiles conditioned on a prescribed current fluctuation. In particular, we show that $F(\omega)$ coincides with the function obtained by Derrida and Gerschenfeld for the single-species SSEP, now derived for an arbitrary number of species directly from the integrable structure of the multispecies MFT equations.
summary:
我们研究无限线上对称简单排除过程 (mSSEP) 的多物种推广的宏观波动理论 (MFT)，其中 $N+1$ 物种的粒子（可能包括空位物种）以单位速率交换位置。使用完整、冗余的粗粒度密度 $\bfrho=\{\rho_0,\dots,\rho_N\}$ 始终保持模型清单的重新标记对称性。我们首先将德里达和格申菲尔德的论点扩展到多物种设置，表明任意图的两个区域之间的多物种电流的累积生成函数仅通过单个标量变量$\omega$取决于边界密度$\bfrho_L，\bfrho_R$和逸度$\bflambda$。然后，我们在无限线上制定了 mSSEP 的 MFT 鞍点方程，并表明它们定义了一个可积系统：它们是 Landau--Lifshitz 型，并且 Zakharov--Takhtajan 规范变换将它们重新塑造为 AKNS 形式。

通过逆散射方法解决由此产生的线性散射问题，我们恢复了多物种电流的累积生成函数$F(Ω)$，以及以规定的电流波动为条件的初始和最终密度分布。特别是，我们证明 $F(\omega)$ 与 Derrida 和 Gerschenfeld 为单物种 SSEP 获得的函数一致，现在直接从多物种 MFT 方程的可积结构导出任意数量的物种。

title: Finite temperature precursors of Mottness in the Fermi Hubbard model
abstract: We investigate finite-temperature precursors of Mottness in the repulsive Hubbard model above the spin-ordering temperature, using numerically exact determinant quantum Monte Carlo. We show that the finite-temperature crossover is accompanied by a pronounced suppression of charge fluctuations, despite the presence of a gapless single-particle spectra, demonstrating that Mottness first emerges via two-particle response in an anomalous metallic regime, before appearing in single-particle spectral functions. We further show that a gap formation in the density of states occurs through momentum-resolved redistribution of spectral weight across the Brillouin zone, that begins at the onset of anomalous metallic regime, rather than through gap formation in single-particle spectral functions at individual momenta. Upon doping, the anomalous-metallic regime generates transport and spectroscopic signatures characteristic of doped Mott insulators. This shows that the transport and spectroscopic anomalies of the doped Hubbard model do not require the presence of a fully formed Mott insulator at half-filling, but instead originate from the strong charge-response renormalization and spectral-weight redistribution that develop within the precursor anomalous metallic regime at half-filling.
summary:
我们使用数值精确的行列式量子蒙特卡罗，研究了自旋排序温度之上的排斥哈伯德模型中莫特内斯的有限温度前体。我们证明，尽管存在无间隙单粒子光谱，有限温度交叉伴随着电荷波动的明显抑制，这证明莫特尼斯首先通过异常金属状态中的两粒子响应出现，然后出现在单粒子光谱函数中。我们进一步表明，态密度中的间隙形成是通过整个布里渊区的光谱权重的动量分辨重新分布而发生的，这始于异常金属状态的开始，而不是通过单个动量处的单粒子光谱函数中的间隙形成。掺杂后，异常金属状态会产生掺杂莫特绝缘体的传输和光谱特征。

这表明，掺杂哈伯德模型的输运和光谱异常不需要半填充时完全形成的莫特绝缘体的存在，而是源于半填充时前体异常金属状态内产生的强电荷响应重整化和光谱权重重新分布。

title: Field theories for Laplacian Growth
abstract: Loop-erased random walks (LERW), the $O(n)$-model at ${n=-2}$ and Laplacian random walks (LRW) are three realizations of the same random process. While this equivalence holds on any graph, renormalization is possible only via the $O(-2)$-model. To generalize LRWs to $b$-LRWs or to Diffusion Limited Aggregation (DLA), a field theory directly on the Laplacian growth process is necessary. Here we construct an exact lattice action for LRWs and show that its perturbative expansion equals that of LERWs. We then generalize this approach to $b$-LRWs and DLA.
summary: 循环擦除随机游走 (LERW)、${n=-2}$ 处的 $O(n)$ 模型和拉普拉斯随机游走 (LRW) 是同一随机过程的三种实现。虽然这种等价性适用于任何图，但只能通过 $O(-2)$ 模型进行重整化。要将 LRW 推广到 $b$-LRW 或扩散有限聚合 (DLA)，需要直接研究拉普拉斯增长过程的场论。在这里，我们为 LRW 构造了一个精确的晶格作用，并表明其微扰膨胀等于 LERW 的微扰膨胀。然后我们将这种方法推广到 $b$-LRW 和 DLA。

title: Strong coupling between propagating spin wave and microwave photons in a superconducting resonator
abstract: We demonstrate strong coupling between propagating spin wave modes and microwave photons in superconducting resonator-magnetic thin film hybrid circuits. By fabricating the resonator directly on yttrium iron garnet thin films grown on rare-earth-free Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$ substrates, we achieve strong coupling of both Damon-Eshbach and backward-volume spin wave modes to the resonator, with coupling strengths exceeding both the magnon and photon damping rates. Furthermore, we observe nonreciprocal spin wave radiation of the hybrid magnonic mode in the Damon-Eshbach configuration, highlighting the potential for incorporating intrinsic spin-wave nonreciprocity into hybrid magnonic systems. These results open new avenues for integrating spin-wave magnonics with cavity magnonics, and for harnessing spin waves for potential applications in quantum information science.
summary: 我们证明了超导谐振器-磁性薄膜混合电路中传播的自旋波模式与微波光子之间的强耦合。通过直接在不含稀土的 Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$ 衬底上生长的钇铁石榴石薄膜上制造谐振器，我们实现了 Damon-Eshbach 和后向体积自旋波模式与谐振器的强耦合，耦合强度超过磁振子和光子阻尼率。此外，我们在 Damon-Eshbach 配置中观察到混合磁波振子模式的非互易自旋波辐射，突出了将固有自旋波非互易性纳入混合磁振子系统的潜力。这些结果为将自旋波磁振子学与腔磁振子学集成以及利用自旋波在量子信息科学中的潜在应用开辟了新途径。

title: Weak-Flow Induced Dielectric Axes Rotation in Dipolar Suspensions
abstract: Conventional rheodielectric studies of dipolar suspensions primarily examine flow-induced variations in the principal permittivity components. In contrast, an asymptotic solution of the perturbed Fokker--Planck equation for orientable Brownian dipoles under weak flow predicts the emergence of off-diagonal permittivity components that are linear in the relative flow strength. For planar shear flow, these terms exceed the corresponding higher-order diagonal corrections, leading to a rotation of the principal dielectric axes. This previously unrecognized rheodielectric response suggests new possibilities for flow-controlled dielectric and electro-optical functionalities.
summary: 偶极悬浮液的传统流变介电研究主要检查流动引起的主介电常数分量的变化。相反，弱流下可定向布朗偶极子的扰动福克-普朗克方程的渐近解预测了相对流强度呈线性的非对角介电常数分量的出现。对于平面剪切流，这些项超出了相应的高阶对角线修正，导致介电主轴旋转。这种以前未被认识的流变介电响应为流量控制介电和电光功能提供了新的可能性。

title: Proactivity and pinning in the non-reciprocal XY model with vision anisotropy
abstract: We study a non-reciprocal XY model on a square lattice, in which spins interact with their nearest neighbors through vision-induced anisotropic interaction. Such anisotropy breaks rotational symmetry and leads to the pinning of the spin orientation along preferred lattice directions. We systematically characterize this phenomenon for different interaction kernels, including modulated, sinusoidal, von Mises, and hard vision-cone couplings, and for two classes of microscopic update rules: Glauber and Langevin dynamics. A central result of this work is the identification and detailed analysis of two distinct contributions that naturally arise in the Langevin formulation, which we refer to as the reactive and the proactive term. We derive the corresponding equations governing both local fluctuations and the global orientation, and use them to characterize the mechanisms responsible for directional pinning. We show that both reactive and proactive contributions can generate global pinning, whereas their role in determining local pinning depends on the specific interaction kernel and may differ qualitatively. Our analysis clarifies the distinction between local and global pinning, explains the emergence of preferred lattice directions in the different models considered, and reconciles apparent discrepancies reported in previous studies. More generally, it provides a microscopic framework for understanding lattice-induced orientational selection in non-reciprocal XY models.
summary:
我们研究了方晶格上的非互易 XY 模型，其中自旋通过视觉诱导的各向异性相互作用与最近的邻居相互作用。这种各向异性打破了旋转对称性并导致自旋方向沿优选晶格方向钉扎。我们系统地描述了不同相互作用核的这种现象，包括调制、正弦、冯·米塞斯和硬视锥耦合，以及两类微观更新规则：格劳伯和朗之万动力学。这项工作的核心成果是识别并详细分析了朗之万公式中自然出现的两个不同的贡献，我们将其称为反应性术语和主动性术语。我们推导了控制局部波动和全局方向的相应方程，并用它们来表征负责方向钉扎的机制。我们表明，反应性和主动性贡献都可以产生全局钉扎，而它们在确定局部钉扎中的作用取决于特定的交互内核，并且可能在质量上有所不同。

我们的分析阐明了局部钉扎和全局钉扎之间的区别，解释了所考虑的不同模型中首选晶格方向的出现，并协调了先前研究中报告的明显差异。更一般地说，它提供了一个微观框架来理解非互易 XY 模型中晶格诱导的取向选择。

title: Exact subsystem dynamics in the deterministic Floquet-PXP model
abstract: The dynamics of local subsystems in a thermodynamically large quantum many-body system can be understood as effectively open as the system produces its own effective bath. The action of this bath can be characterised in terms of the so-called influence matrices. In generic situations, the complexity of these objects grows unfavourably with time, however, there exist solvable cases where influence matrices can be characterised exactly even in the presence of non-trivial interactions. Here we show that Rule 201, a deterministic version of the Floquet-PXP model, is one of these solvable instances. Indeed, it admits influence matrices given by a finite-dimensional matrix-product operator (MPO) that solves a finite set of algebraic conditions. We provide the solution, and characterise multi-time autocorrelation functions.
summary: 热力学大量子多体系统中局部子系统的动力学可以理解为有效开放，因为系统产生了自己的有效浴。该浴的作用可以用所谓的影响矩阵来表征。在一般情况下，这些对象的复杂性随着时间的推移而不利地增长，但是，存在可解决的情况，即使存在非平凡的交​​互，也可以准确地表征影响矩阵。在这里，我们展示了规则 201（Floquet-PXP 模型的确定性版本）就是这些可解实例之一。事实上，它承认由有限维矩阵乘积算子 (MPO) 给出的影响矩阵，该算子求解有限代数条件集。我们提供了解决方案，并描述了多时间自相关函数的特征。

title: Specific absorption rate of uniaxial single-domain nanomagnets: stochastic spin dynamics versus linear response theory
abstract: We compute the specific absorption rate of a uniaxial single-domain nanomagnet driven by an alternating magnetic field by two methods: i) direct numerical integration of the stochastic (Langevin) Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert equation (the LLL approach), and ii) linear response theory (LRT) based on the Debye susceptibility with the Néel relaxation time $\tau_\mathrm{N}$. We first analytically show that both methods are equivalent for small magnetic field amplitude, and then compute their deviation $\Lambda\equiv \mathrm{SAR}_{\mathrm{LLL}}/\mathrm{SAR}_{\mathrm{LRT}}-1$ as a function of the magnetic field amplitude for two temperatures chosen on opposite sides of the Debye resonance. One of the main results is that the sign and magnitude of $\Lambda$ are governed by the dimensionless product $\omega\tau_\mathrm{N}$, in addition to the linearity parameter $\xi=\mu_{s}B_{0}/k_{B}T$ for the easy-axis geometry considered here. Indeed, below resonance ($\omega\tau_\mathrm{N}<1$), linear response theory overestimates the specific absorption rate. In contrast, above resonance ($\omega\tau_\mathrm{N}>1$, the regime typical of blocked nanoparticles), linear response theory can underestimate the specific absorption rate by up to $\sim70\%$ at $\xi\sim2$. We expect this work to provide quantitative guidance for the use of linear response theory in magnetic hyperthermia and related nanoscale heat-transport problems, and to serve as a single-particle benchmark for extensions to many-spin and interacting systems.
summary:
我们通过两种方法计算由交变磁场驱动的单轴单畴纳米磁体的比吸收率：i）随机（Langevin）Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert方程的直接数值积分（LLL方法），以及ii）基于德拜磁化率和尼尔弛豫时间$\tau_\mathrm{N}$的线性响应理论（LRT）。我们首先分析表明这两种方法对于小磁场幅度是等效的，然后计算它们的偏差 $\Lambda\equiv \mathrm{SAR}_{\mathrm{LLL}}/\mathrm{SAR}_{\mathrm{LRT}}-1$ 作为德拜共振相对侧选择的两个温度的磁场幅度的函数。主要结果之一是，除了这里考虑的易轴几何的线性参数 $\xi=\mu_{s}B_{0}/k_{B}T$ 之外，$\Lambda$ 的符号和大小还受到无量纲乘积 $\omega\tau_\mathrm{N}$ 的控制。事实上，低于共振 ($\omega\tau_\mathrm{N}<1$)，线性响应理论高估了比吸收率。

相反，在共振之上（$\omega\tau_\mathrm{N}>1$，受阻纳米颗粒的典型状态），线性响应理论可以低估 $\xi\sim2$ 处的比吸收率高达 $\sim70\%$。我们希望这项工作能够为线性响应理论在磁热疗和相关纳米级热传输问题中的使用提供定量指导，并作为扩展到多自旋和相互作用系统的单粒子基准。

title: Large-$N$ Carrollian Thermodynamics from AdS Black-Hole Phase-Space Contractions
abstract: We develop the boundary and celestial interpretation of finite Carrollian black-hole thermodynamics. The bulk input is the phase-space contraction of the time generator and Newton constant for which the extended AdS first law has a finite Carrollian limit. We show that this finite first-law line has a holographic interpretation as a double-scaled low-temperature, large-$N$ ensemble: the Carrollian temperature decreases while the effective number of boundary degrees of freedom grows, leaving the thermodynamic products in the first law finite. The large-$N$ dictionary is anchored by the standard $\mathrm{AdS}_5/\mathrm{CFT}_4$ normalization of adjoint degrees of freedom and by the Brown--Henneaux central charge in $\mathrm{AdS}_3/\mathrm{CFT}_2$. We construct the finite Carrollian Brown--York stress tensor on the contracted AdS boundary and show that its global energy charge is the finite bulk Hamiltonian. We then derive the boundary form of the first law in terms of the spatial volume and the holographic degree-of-freedom normalization. This identifies the Hawking--Page locus with the zero of the chemical potential conjugate to the count of degrees of freedom. The same charge is the global Carrollian supertranslation charge, so the finite first law is the thermal zero-mode sector of the Carrollian Ward identity. Finally, we construct the celestial conformal-primary representation of thermal Carrollian correlators. The finite celestial-basis correlators are rescaled double-scaled correlators obtained by combining the Fourier--Mellin transform with the rescaled thermal frequency window.
summary:
我们开发了有限卡罗尔黑洞热力学的边界和天体解释。批量输入是时间生成器和牛顿常数的相空间收缩，其中扩展的 AdS 第一定律具有有限的卡罗尔极限。我们证明，这条有限第一定律线具有双尺度低温、大$N$系综的全息解释：卡罗尔温度下降，而边界自由度的有效数量增加，使得第一定律中的热力学产物有限。大$N$字典由伴随自由度的标准$\mathrm{AdS}_5/\mathrm{CFT}_4$归一化和$\mathrm{AdS}_3/\mathrm{CFT}_2$中的Brown--Henneaux中心电荷锚定。我们在收缩的 AdS 边界上构造了有限的 Carrollian Brown-York 应力张量，并表明其全局能量电荷是有限的体哈密顿量。然后，我们根据空间体积和全息自由度归一化推导第一定律的边界形式。这将霍金-佩奇轨迹识别为自由度计数的化学势共轭为零。

相同的电荷是全局卡罗尔超平移电荷，因此有限第一定律是卡罗尔沃德恒等式的热零模扇区。最后，我们构建了热卡罗尔相关器的天体共形主表示。有限天基相关器是通过将傅立叶-梅林变换与重新标度的热频率窗相结合而获得的重新标度的双尺度相关器。

title: De Sitter Representations
abstract: We review the representations of so(1,D), the algebra of isometries of D dimensional de Sitter space. We cover the representations in all D, including mixed symmetry representations and fermionic representations, and connect them to the various types of fields that can propagate on de Sitter space. The presentation is from a physics point of view, favoring concrete constructions over abstract considerations.
summary: 我们回顾了 so(1,D) 的表示，即 D 维德西特空间的等距代数。我们涵盖了所有 D 中的表示，包括混合对称表示和费米子表示，并将它们连接到可以在德西特空间上传播的各种类型的场。该演示从物理学的角度出发，倾向于具体的结构而不是抽象的考虑。

title: Conserved charges and $L_\infty$ algebras
abstract: We give a formula for conserved charges in an arbitrary Lagrangian field theory expressed in the framework of $L_\infty$ algebras. The formula is expressed in terms of the theory's $L_\infty$ data alone, without reference to the derivative structure of the Lagrangian. Therefore conserved charges can be computed in nonlocal models, such as string field theory, where conventional methods break down. We also show that the formula correctly expresses the surface charge of general relativity in terms of the Brown-York stress tensor. Related computations in Yang-Mills theory suggest that spatial boundaries are dealt with in a natural fashion.
summary: 我们给出了在 $L_\infty$ 代数框架中表达的任意拉格朗日场论中守恒电荷的公式。该公式仅用理论的$L_\infty$数据来表达，没有参考拉格朗日的导数结构。因此，守恒电荷可以在非局域模型中计算，例如弦场理论，而传统方法在该模型中不起作用。我们还表明，该公式用布朗-约克应力张量正确表达了广义相对论的表面电荷。杨-米尔斯理论中的相关计算表明，空间边界是以自然方式处理的。

title: An observer's quantization of 3d de Sitter
abstract: What is the density of states of the de Sitter static patch? We propose a definition and calculation of such a density in 3d dS. Our proposal involves a sum over an SL(2,$\mathbb{Z}$) set of Euclidean no-boundary Kerr-lens spacetimes sourced by a line-defect with given energy and spin - which in Lorentzian time represents an observer's worldline at the center of the dS static patch. We develop an exact quantum computation of the spectral density using a holographic duality between dS$_3$ gravity and two copies of $\mathbb{C}$LS, the complex Liouville string. The SL(2,$\mathbb{Z}$) Kerr-lens spacetimes map under the duality to an SL(2,$\mathbb{Z}$) family of generalized crosscap geometries. We compute the $\mathbb{C}$LS $\otimes$ $\mathbb{C}$LS crosscap amplitudes and show that they match the semi-classical gravity prediction. For the simplest non-trivial Kerr-lens space, the $\mathbb{C}$LS $\otimes$ $\mathbb{C}$LS description is, in turn, dual to two copies of the $G\Sigma$ effective field theory of the double scaled SYK model. The $G\Sigma\otimes G\Sigma$ theory lives on an observer's worldline in the static patch, setting the stage for developing a microscopic worldline hologram of 3d de Sitter.
summary:
德西特静态贴片的态密度是多少？我们提出了 3d dS 中这种密度的定义和计算。我们的建议涉及一组欧几里得无边界克尔透镜时空 SL(2,$\mathbb{Z}$) 的总和，该时空源自具有给定能量和自旋的线缺陷 - 在洛伦兹时间中代表观察者在 dS 静态补丁中心的世界线。我们使用 dS$_3$ 引力和 $\mathbb{C}$LS（复杂的刘维尔弦）的两个副本之间的全息对偶性开发了光谱密度的精确量子计算。 SL(2,$\mathbb{Z}$) 克尔透镜时空在对偶性下映射到 SL(2,$\mathbb{Z}$) 广义横盖几何家族。我们计算了 $\mathbb{C}$LS $\otimes$ $\mathbb{C}$LS 横顶振幅，并表明它们与半经典重力预测相匹配。对于最简单的非平凡克尔透镜空间，$\mathbb{C}$LS $\otimes$ $\mathbb{C}$LS 描述反过来是双尺度 SYK 模型的 $G\Sigma$ 有效场论的两个副本的对偶。

$G\Sigma\otimes G\Sigma$ 理论存在于静态补丁中观察者的世界线中，为开发 3d de Sitter 的微观世界线全息图奠定了基础。

title: Charged and rotating near-horizon geometries in five dimensions
abstract: We present new charged and rotating near-horizon geometries in five-dimensional Einstein-Maxwell theory in closed analytic form. The solutions can be parametrised by the charge and two independent angular momenta. We also generalise these near-horizon geometries to theories with an additional Chern-Simons term in the action multiplied by an arbitrary coupling constant. The new solutions have the same entropy relations as expected for charged versions of extremal Myers-Perry black holes and for rotating versions of extremal Reissner-Nordström-Tangherlini black holes, but they do not reduce to the Myers-Perry horizon in the vacuum limit. The horizon cross-sections are spherical and carry a Sasakian structure. We exploit this structure to prove a characterisation of our solutions: without any symmetry assumptions, they are the most general rotating extremal horizons for which the co-rotating electric field is a (non-zero) constant. We further extend this construction to higher dimensions, where we show that any Sasaki-Einstein manifold generates a two-parameter family of charged and rotating horizons.
summary: 我们以封闭解析形式提出了五维爱因斯坦-麦克斯韦理论中新的带电和旋转近地平线几何结构。解可以通过电荷和两个独立的角动量进行参数化。我们还将这些近地平线几何形状推广到理论，其中在作用中添加了一个额外的 Chern-Simons 项乘以任意耦合常数。新解具有与极值迈尔斯-佩里黑洞的带电版本和极值赖斯纳-诺德斯特伦-唐格尔利尼黑洞的旋转版本预期的相同的熵关系，但它们不会减少到真空极限中的迈尔斯-佩里视界。地平线横截面是球形的并且具有佐佐木结构。我们利用这种结构来证明我们的解决方案的特征：在没有任何对称性假设的情况下，它们是最一般的旋转极值视界，其中同向旋转电场是（非零）常数。我们进一步将这种结构扩展到更高的维度，我们证明任何佐佐木-爱因斯坦流形都会生成带电和旋转视界的二参数族。

title: A Circle That Won't Return: The Fate of RR Fluxes and D-branes in Type 0A Tachyon Condensation
abstract: We study the closed-string tachyon and doubled Ramond-Ramond sector of type 0A in light of the proposed M-theory description on $S^1\vee S^1$-the wedge of two circles joined at a point. In this picture the two RR copies are associated with the two circle components, which we call branches, and tachyon condensation corresponds to shrinking one branch to the type IIA endpoint. From the type 0A equations of motion, we derive the branch-balance condition for a tachyon stationary point and identify the branch-odd RR fluctuation that sources the tachyon around a symmetric background. We then analyze the fate of the collapsing branch RR data as one branch of the wedge collapses to the type IIA endpoint. For an isolated unscreened collapsing-branch $D_p^-$ source, a Gauss-law estimate shows that the long-range RR field-energy cost scales inversely with the shrinking circle and thus becoming infinitely costly, generalizing the $D0^-$-brane decoupling in the original wedge picture. We describe the infrared screening of the relative RR field through an effective higher-form Stückelberg mechanism and distinguish this from a possible discharge of localized relative charge. Finally, using standard Wess-Zumino couplings of D-branes, we identify an effective relative-charge carrier and derive a parametric thin-wall criterion for when such a discharge channel $D_p^- \to D_p^+$ can be energetically favored.
summary:
我们根据 $S^1\vee S^1$（在一点连接的两个圆的楔形）上提出的 M 理论描述，研究 0A 型闭弦快子和双 Ramond-Ramond 扇区。在这张图中，两个 RR 副本与两个圆分量相关联，我们称之为分支，而快子凝聚对应于将一个分支收缩到 IIA 型端点。从 0A 型运动方程中，我们推导了快子驻点的分支平衡条件，并识别了在对称背景周围产生快子的奇分支 RR 涨落。然后，我们分析当楔形的一个分支塌陷到 IIA 型端点时塌陷分支 RR 数据的命运。对于孤立的未屏蔽塌陷分支 $D_p^-$ 源，高斯定律估计表明，长程 RR 场能量成本与缩小的圆成反比，从而变得无限成本，概括了原始楔形图中的 $D0^-$-膜解耦。我们通过有效的更高形式的 Stückelberg 机制描述了相对 RR 场的红外屏蔽，并将其与局部相对电荷的可能放电区分开来。

最后，使用 D 膜的标准 Wess-Zumino 耦合，我们识别了有效的相对电荷载流子，并导出了何时可以大力支持这种放电通道 $D_p^- \to D_p^+$ 的参数薄壁准则。

title: Dirichlet, Neumann, Mixed and self-dual holography: (self-dual) Yang--Mills theory II
abstract: We consider Yang--Mills, Chalmers--Siegel and self-dual Yang--Mills (SDYM) theories within AdS/CFT correspondence. Bulk-to-bulk and boundary-to-bulk propagators are derived in various gauges and for Dirichlet, Neumann, mixed and self-dual boundary conditions. Three- and four-point holographic correlators are computed in the three theories to establish the relation between the observables thereof. This is a companion paper to [ arXiv:2602.21658 ].
summary: 我们在 AdS/CFT 对应中考虑 Yang--Mills、Chalmers--Siegel 和自对偶 Yang--Mills (SDYM) 理论。体到体和边界到体的传播子是在各种规范中以及狄利克雷、诺依曼、混合和自对偶边界条件下导出的。在三种理论中计算三点和四点全息相关器以建立其可观测量之间的关系。这是 [ arXiv:2602.21658 ] 的姊妹篇。

title: Deformed BTZ Radiance and Single Trace $T\bar{T}$ Holography
abstract: We generalize the "holar wind" mechanism proposed in arXiv:2303.00234 to the case of rotating $\lambda$-deformed BTZ black holes. These backgrounds, which interpolate between $AdS_3$ in the infrared and a linear dilaton spacetime in the ultraviolet, are realized as an exact $\frac{SL(2,\mathbb{R})_k\times U(1)}{U(1)}$ gauged-WZW worldsheet theory. The long string sector of the theory provides a holographic dual to single-trace $T\overline{T}$ deformed symmetric product $\mathcal{M}^p/S_p$ $CFT_2$ with a seed $\mathcal{M}$ carrying a central charge $c=6k$. By analyzing the geodesics and tunneling rates of probe particles and winding long strings, we show that the emission probabilities for both positive and negative deformation couplings are universally governed by the change in the Bekenstein-Hawking entropy, $\Delta S_{BH}$. A central result of our analysis is that the consistency of long string emission within the grand canonical ensemble dictates a unique value for the background B-field at the origin. We demonstrate that this thermodynamically fixed value matches precisely the prediction required for the string excitation spectrum to agree with the $\mathbb{Z}_w$ twisted sector of a single-trace $T\overline{T}$ deformed symmetric product orbifold. Finally, we sketch the extension of these results to a broader class of black holes whose long string sector is dual to single-trace $T\overline{T} + J\overline{T} + T\overline{J}$ deformed theories.
summary:
我们将 arXiv:2303.00234 中提出的“霍尔风”机制推广到旋转 $\lambda$ 变形 BTZ 黑洞的情况。这些背景插值在红外线中的 $AdS_3$ 和紫外线中的线性膨胀时空之间，被实现为精确的 $\frac{SL(2,\mathbb{R})_k\times U(1)}{U(1)}$ 计量 WZW 世界表理论。该理论的长弦扇区提供了全息双迹到单迹 $T\overline{T}$ 变形对称积 $\mathcal{M}^p/S_p$ $CFT_2$，种子 $\mathcal{M}$ 带有中心电荷 $c=6k$。通过分析探针粒子和缠绕长弦的测地线和隧道速率，我们表明正负变形耦合的发射概率普遍受贝肯斯坦-霍金熵 $\Delta S_{BH}$ 变化的控制。我们分析的一个核心结果是，大正则系综内长弦发射的一致性决定了原点处背景 B 场的唯一值。

我们证明，这个热力学固定值与弦激励谱所需的预测精确匹配，以与单迹 $T\overline{T}$ 变形对称乘积轨道的 $\mathbb{Z}_w$ 扭曲扇区一致。最后，我们将这些结果推广到更广泛的一类黑洞，其长弦扇区与单迹 $T\overline{T} + J\overline{T} + T\overline{J}$ 变形理论对偶。

title: Duality-covariant particles and exotic branes
abstract: In this paper we construct duality-covariant worldvolume dynamics of particles and branes. We extend known actions and phase space formulations to include the hidden $E_8$ symmetry of 11D supergravity, analogous to the Ehlers symmetry of 4D gravity. Making the worldvolume theory manifestly duality-covariant requires the ancillary structure of $E_8$ exceptional field theory to be taken into account. For zero-branes, we propose an enlarged worldline model with a coadjoint orbit term to encode this. More generally, we propose worldvolume theories for arbitrary exotic branes in a way that generalises the known gauged sigma model of the Kaluza-Klein monopole. These are natural in the duality-covariant Hamiltonian formulation employed here. We discuss the case of zero-branes in eleven dimensions as an illustrative example.
summary: 在本文中，我们构建了粒子和膜的二元协变世界体积动力学。我们扩展了已知的作用和相空间公式，以包含 11 维超重力的隐藏 $E_8$ 对称性，类似于 4 维重力的埃勒斯对称性。要使世界体积理论具有明显的对偶协变性，需要考虑 $E_8$ 例外场论的辅助结构。对于零膜，我们提出了一个放大的世界线模型，并用共轭轨道项对其进行编码。更一般地说，我们以概括已知的卡鲁扎-克莱因单极子规范西格玛模型的方式提出了任意奇异膜的世界体积理论。这些在此处使用的对偶协变哈密顿公式中是很自然的。我们讨论十一维零膜的情况作为说明性示例。

title: Holographic $s$- and $p$-wave superconductors from the $4D$ regularization of Einstein-Lovelock theory
abstract: We investigate holographically dual descriptions of $(2+1)$-dimensional s-wave and p-wave superconductors in the framework of regularized four-dimensional Einstein-Lovelock gravity theories, incorporating higher curvature corrections beyond the Gauss-Bonnet sector. We first implement the 4D regularization of Einstein-Lovelock gravity with finely tuned coupling constants to include corrections up to any $K$th order in curvature. The bulk geometry is constructed from exact black-brane solutions characterized by the fine-tuned Lovelock coupling $\alpha$ and the highest power of curvature in the Lagrangian K. We then analyze the condensation of scalar and vector operators dual to minimally coupled matter fields, focusing on two bulk-field mass prescriptions, which significantly affect the superconducting phase. Our results demonstrate that higher curvature terms significantly modify the phase structure of both s-wave and p-wave systems and enhance the sensitivity of the condensates and critical temperatures to the gravitational couplings. In both cases, the critical temperature generally increases with the maximal curvature order K, leading to higher-$T_c$ phases compared to Einstein gravity, particularly for negative $\alpha$. The coupling $\alpha$ effectively governs the strength of higher curvature interactions in the bulk: positive $\alpha$ suppresses condensation and lowers $T_c$, whereas negative $\alpha$ enhances superconducting order and promotes higher-$T_c$ phases relative to Einstein gravity. We further study the optical conductivity and find that both the gap frequency and the ratio $\omega_g/T_c$ exhibit a strong dependence on $\alpha$ and $K$, deviating from the universal Einstein-gravity result. Higher curvature effects enhance the superconducting gap scale. Notably, the p-wave system shows a stronger sensitivity to the mass-fixing prescription compared to the s-wave case.
summary:
我们在正则化四维爱因斯坦-洛夫洛克引力理论框架内研究了 $(2+1)$ 维 s 波和 p 波超导体的全息对偶描述，并结合了高斯-博内扇区之外的更高曲率修正。我们首先通过微调耦合常数来实现爱因斯坦-洛夫洛克引力的 4D 正则化，以包括高达任意 $K$ 阶曲率的修正。体几何结构是由精确的黑膜解构建的，其特征是微调洛夫洛克耦合 $\alpha$ 和拉格朗日 K 中的最高曲率幂。然后，我们分析了对偶到最小耦合物质场的标量和矢量算子的凝聚，重点关注两个对超导相有显着影响的体场质量规定。我们的结果表明，较高的曲率项显着改变了 s 波和 p 波系统的相结构，并增强了凝聚态和临界温度对引力耦合的敏感性。

在这两种情况下，临界温度通常随着最大曲率阶 K 的增加而增加，从而导致与爱因斯坦引力相比更高的 $T_c$ 相，特别是对于负 $\alpha$ 。耦合 $\alpha$ 有效地控制了块体中较高曲率相互作用的强度：正 $\alpha$ 抑制凝结并降低 $T_c$，而负 $\alpha$ 增强超导序并促进相对于爱因斯坦引力更高的 $T_c$ 相。我们进一步研究了光导率，发现间隙频率和比率 $\omega_g/T_c$ 都表现出对 $\alpha$ 和 $K$ 的强烈依赖性，偏离了普遍的爱因斯坦引力结果。较高的曲率效应增强了超导间隙尺度。值得注意的是，与 s 波情况相比，p 波系统对质量固定处方表现出更强的敏感性。

title: Central charges $C_J$ and $C_T$ in QED$_d$-GNY model and scalar QED$_d$
abstract: We compute the leading-order $1/N$ corrections to the central charges $C_J$ and $C_T$ in the conformal QED$_d$-Gross-Neveu-Yukawa (GNY) model and the scalar QED$_d$ in $d$ dimensions. The scaling dimensions of the lowest adjoint bilinear scalars are obtained to order $O(1/N)$ for general $d$. In $d=3$, the $U(1)$ Abelian gauge theory possesses a topological $U(1)$ global symmetry, and we evaluate the central charge $C_J^{\text{top}}$ of the topological symmetry current to subleading order in the $1/N$ expansion. Our interest in these theories is primarily motivated by their potential connection to the $SO(5)$ symmetric deconfined quantum critical point (DQCP). We compare the large $N$ results for the central charges $C_J$ and $C_T$ with the conformal data of the $SO(5)$ DQCP obtained from fuzzy sphere and conformal bootstrap. The large $N$ predictions of the QED$_3$-GNY model are found to be in reasonable agreement with the nonperturbative estimates for the $SO(5)$ DQCP.
summary: 我们计算共形 QED$_d$-Gross-Neveu-Yukawa (GNY) 模型中中心电荷 $C_J$ 和 $C_T$ 的前导 $1/N$ 修正以及 $d$ 维度中的标量 QED$_d$。获得最低伴随双线性标量的缩放维数，以便为一般 $d$ 排序 $O(1/N)$。在$d=3$中，$U(1)$阿贝尔规范理论具有拓扑$U(1)$全局对称性，我们将拓扑对称的中心电荷$C_J^{\text{top}}$评估为$1/N$展开中的次导序。我们对这些理论的兴趣主要源于它们与 $SO(5)$ 对称解禁量子临界点 (DQCP) 的潜在联系。我们将中心电荷 $C_J$ 和 $C_T$ 的大 $N$ 结果与从模糊球和共形自举获得的 $SO(5)$ DQCP 的共形数据进行比较。发现 QED$_3$-GNY 模型的大 $N$ 预测与 $SO(5)$ DQCP 的非微扰估计相当一致。

title: Generating Special Triangulations with Transformers
abstract: Triangulations, i.e., well-structured decompositions of geometric objects into triangle-like pieces, are central objects in many domains of mathematics and physics. In particular, fine, regular, and star triangulations (FRSTs) of 4D reflexive polytopes give rise to smooth Calabi-Yau threefolds, which are of significant interest in string theory. However, the high dimensionality and combinatorial complexity of triangulations make them particularly challenging to model with classical numerical methods or machine learning. In this work, we show that transformers, equipped with an appropriate encoding scheme, can be effectively trained to representatively generate new FRSTs across a range of polytope sizes. Moreover, these models can also self-improve through retraining on their own output. This opens the door to both concrete applications to the classification of Calabi-Yau manifolds and further research in physics, combinatorics and algebraic geometry.
summary: 三角剖分，即将几何对象结构良好地分解为类似三角形的部分，是数学和物理学许多领域的中心对象。特别是，4D 自反多面体的精细三角剖分、规则三角剖分和星形三角剖分 (FRST) 会产生平滑的卡拉比-丘三重，这在弦理论中具有重要意义。然而，三角测量的高维性和组合复杂性使得使用经典数值方法或机器学习进行建模特别具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们展示了配备适当编码方案的 Transformer 可以被有效地训练，以在一系列多胞体大小上有代表性地生成新的 FRST。此外，这些模型还可以通过对自己的输出进行再训练来进行自我改进。这为卡拉比-丘流形分类的具体应用以及物理学、组合学和代数几何的进一步研究打开了大门。

title: The Sharp Edges of Calabi-Yau Manifolds: Designing Symmetric Models for Ricci-flat Metrics
abstract: Computing Ricci-flat metrics on Calabi-Yau manifolds is challenging since no closed-form solutions are known. However, these computations are needed in order to make physical predictions in heterotic string theory, such as the masses of quarks and Yukawa couplings. In this manuscript, we present an overview of relevant literature for learning about Calabi-Yau manifolds, as ML researchers often face a steep learning curve when entering the field. Furthermore, we survey the impact of the manifold's symmetries on machine learning approximations to these flat metrics. We also characterise the isometries of Ricci-flat metrics, a result frequently omitted or used without proof. Then, we address symmetry breaking in point sampling and introduce a novel formula for computing volume ratios on general CICY manifolds. We conclude by presenting a new symmetry-aware model built using graph neural networks that avoids pathological behaviour witnessed in some other models.
summary: 计算 Calabi-Yau 流形上的 Ricci-flat 度量具有挑战性，因为没有已知的封闭式解。然而，为了在异质弦理论中进行物理预测，例如夸克质量和汤川耦合，需要这些计算。在这篇手稿中，我们概述了用于学习 Calabi-Yau 流形的相关文献，因为机器学习研究人员在进入该领域时经常面临陡峭的学习曲线。此外，我们调查了流形对称性对这些平面指标的机器学习近似的影响。我们还描述了 Ricci 平坦度量的等距特征，这个结果经常被省略或在没有证明的情况下使用。然后，我们解决了点采样中的对称性破缺问题，并引入了一种计算一般 CICY 流形上体积比的新公式。最后，我们提出了一种使用图神经网络构建的新的对称感知模型，该模型避免了其他模型中出现的病态行为。

title: Dyeing form factors as amplitudes
abstract: The double copy of form factors has revealed a striking feature: poles that are spurious from the gauge-theory perspective become physical propagators in gravity. At the same time, form factors obey hidden factorization relations on the kinematics of these poles. We explain both phenomena by introducing a dyeing procedure, which promotes the color-singlet operator, or the Higgs particle representing it, to an adjoint massive state. The original form factor is recovered by the inverse bleaching operation, realized as a $U(1)$ decoupling of the dyed leg. In the dyed theory, these apparent spurious poles turn into ordinary physical propagators of colored amplitudes, and the hidden factorization relations follow from standard BCJ relations. Applying this framework to multiple operator insertions gives a systematic double-copy construction for multi-Higgs amplitudes and, as a byproduct, reveals scalar-ordering sectors. We also discuss higher-length scalar operators and fermionic operators, including the dyed vector construction for $\bar{\psi}\gamma^{\mu}\psi$, as well as a loop-level example.
summary: 形状因素的双重副本揭示了一个显着的特征：从规范理论的角度来看，虚假的极点变成了重力的物理传播者。同时，形状因子服从这些极点运动学上的隐藏因子分解关系。我们通过引入染色程序来解释这两种现象，该染色程序将颜色单线算子或代表它的希格斯粒子提升到伴随质量状态。原始形状因数通过逆漂白操作恢复，实现为染色腿的 $U(1)$ 解耦。在染色理论中，这些明显的杂散极点变成了有色振幅的普通物理传播器，并且隐藏的因式分解关系遵循标准 BCJ 关系。将该框架应用于多个算子插入，为多希格斯振幅提供了系统的双拷贝构造，并且作为副产品，揭示了标量排序扇区。我们还讨论了更高长度的标量运算符和费米子运算符，包括 $\bar{\psi}\gamma^{\mu}\psi$ 的染色向量构造，以及循环级示例。

title: Non-topological solitons in biadjoint scalar field theory
abstract: Biadjoint scalar theory has been widely studied, due to its being closely related to the double copy correspondence linking gauge, gravity and related theories. In this paper, we continue a programme of work in elucidating non-linear solutions of this theory, and find a family of new solutions that are richer and more complex than previous cases. Using an ansatz that can be embedded in any choice of non-abelian colour groups, we demonstrate the existence of non-topological solitons, whose existence is protected by carrying a U(1) charge associated with certain rotations in colour space. The solutions are time-dependent, and closely related to the well-known Q-ball solutions in other scalar field theories. We also show explicitly that our solution set contains those that are stable under small perturbations within a consistent truncation of the theory, and have finite energy in addition to being localised.
summary: 双伴随标量理论由于与连接规范、引力及相关理论的双副本对应关系密切，而得到了广泛的研究。在本文中，我们继续阐明该理论的非线性解决方案，并找到一系列比以前的情况更丰富、更复杂的新解决方案。使用可以嵌入到任何非阿贝尔颜色组中的 ansatz，我们证明了非拓扑孤子的存在，其存在通过携带与颜色空间中的某些旋转相关的 U(1) 电荷来保护。这些解是时间相关的，并且与其他标量场论中著名的 Q 球解密切相关。我们还明确表明，我们的解集包含在理论一致截断内的小扰动下稳定的解集，并且除了局部化之外还具有有限的能量。

title: Index saddle for the D1-D5-P black string and its decoupling limit
abstract: Boruch, Emparan, Iliesiu, and Murthy recently discussed index saddles for 5d black strings, showing that the black string saddle admits a decoupling limit to a complex, finite-temperature BTZ \times S^2 saddle that computes the index of the dual CFT. In this paper, we pursue an analogous construction for the D1-D5-P black string. We construct a four-charge index saddle in the four-dimensional STU model as the BPS limit of the non-extremal four-charge black hole, and show that it exhibits the new form of attraction. We then uplift it successively to five and six dimensions, via the 4D-5D connection and a chain of string dualities, to obtain the gravitational index saddle for the D1-D5-P black string. We take a systematic decoupling limit of this index saddle and obtain the BTZ \times S^3 saddle that computes the index of the D1-D5 CFT.
summary: Boruch、Emparan、Iliesiu 和 Murthy 最近讨论了 5d 黑弦的索引鞍，表明黑弦鞍承认计算对偶 CFT 索引的复杂、有限温度 BTZ \times S^2 鞍的解耦限制。在本文中，我们追求 D1-D5-P 黑弦的类似结构。我们在四维STU模型中构造了一个四电荷指数鞍作为非极值四电荷黑洞的BPS极限，并证明它表现出新的吸引力形式。然后，我们通过4D-5D连接和弦对偶性链将其依次提升到五维和六维，以获得D1-D5-P黑弦的引力指数鞍。我们对该索引鞍进行系统解耦限制，并获得计算 D1-D5 CFT 索引的 BTZ \times S^3 鞍。

title: Approximating Feynman integrals using complete monotonicity and Stieltjes properties
abstract: We present two novel approaches for the numerical evaluation of Feynman integrals based on their universal analytic properties related to positivity, namely complete monotonicity (CM) and Stieltjes properties. Building on recent results, we exploit the fact that scalar Feynman integrals in the Euclidean region are completely monotonic functions, meaning that all their derivatives have a fixed sign. Building on this observation, the CM bootstrap allows one to reconstruct integrals from differential equations without explicit boundary data, yielding rigorous bounds. The second method is based on a refinement of CM. We prove that Feynman integrals, within a certain range of parameters, are not only CM but in fact Stieltjes functions. This enables the use of Padé approximants with provable convergence properties in the cut complex plane, providing an efficient method for analytic continuation and fast numerical evaluation. We illustrate the method with simple examples such as the massive bubble integral and discuss applications to multi-loop integrals, including the 20-loop banana integral. Finally, we comment on a number of extensions of these novel avenues for computing Feynman integrals.
summary:
我们基于费曼积分与正性相关的通用分析性质，即完全单调性 (CM) 和 Stieltjes 性质，提出了两种新颖的费曼积分数值评估方法。基于最近的结果，我们利用了欧几里德区域中的标量费曼积分是完全单调函数的事实，这意味着它们的所有导数都有固定的符号。基于这一观察，CM bootstrap 允许人们在没有明确边界数据的情况下从微分方程重建积分，从而产生严格的边界。第二种方法基于 CM 的细化。我们证明，在一定参数范围内，费曼积分不仅是 CM，而且实际上是 Stieltjes 函数。这使得能够在切割复平面中使用具有可证明收敛特性的 Padé 近似，为解析延拓和快速数值评估提供有效的方法。我们用简单的例子（例如大气泡积分）来说明该方法，并讨论在多环积分（包括 20 环香蕉积分）中的应用。

最后，我们对这些计算费曼积分的新颖途径的一些扩展进行了评论。

title: The gauge invariance of non-perturbative vertex prescriptions
abstract: We study the gauge invariance of different continuum methods to include non-perturbative effects in gauge theories. We work with three dimensional quantum electrodynamics and implement vertices using two different methods: a set of coupled Schwinger-Dyson (SD) integral equations, and the self-consistent equations obtained from the 3-particle irreducible (3PI) effective action. We work in Landau gauge and assess the extent to which results are gauge invariant by checking how well the Ward identity is satisfied. Our results show that there is a fairly significant violation of the Ward identity at large coupling, although the 3PI effective theory is slightly better than the SD vertex. We also compare the results of both calculations with the commonly used Ball-Chiu ansatz and show that the agreement of the ansatz with both non-perturbative vertices is fairly good at small coupling but deviates more significantly at large coupling. We compare results for the two point functions of the theory and discuss the possible implications for phase transitions.
summary: 我们研究不同连续统方法的规范不变性，以将非微扰效应纳入规范理论中。我们研究三维量子电动力学，并使用两种不同的方法实现顶点：一组耦合的 Schwinger-Dyson (SD) 积分方程，以及从 3 粒子不可约 (3PI) 有效作用获得的自洽方程。我们使用 Landau 规范进行工作，并通过检查 Ward 恒等式的满足程度来评估结果规范不变的程度。我们的结果表明，尽管 3PI 有效理论比 SD 顶点稍好，但在大耦合下存在相当显着的 Ward 恒等式违背。我们还将这两种计算的结果与常用的 Ball-Chiu ansatz 进行了比较，结果表明，ansatz 与两个非微扰顶点的一致性在小耦合时相当好，但在大耦合时偏差更显着。我们比较理论的两个点函数的结果，并讨论对相变的可能影响。

title: Causality and the Equivalence Principle for Higher Energy Scattering
abstract: Recently, it was proposed that the leading high-energy behavior of scattering amplitudes is universal, independent of charge, thereby extending the equivalence principle beyond the graviton pole. In this Letter, we derive a sharper causality constraint on such behavior by studying the Regge limit of colored scattering. Parameterizing a trajectory by $s^{\alpha(t)}$ with $\alpha(0)=2-\delta$, we analyze the Shapiro/Wigner--Smith time-delays in the irreducible scattering channels. We show that any non-singlet trajectory with $\delta< 1/2$ produces a growing sign-indefinite time-delay (with $\delta=1/2$ a marginal, dimension-dependent case), which becomes dominant in the Regge diffusion region in the weak-gravity regime. The essential point is that, while the eikonal phase is naturally organized in $t$-channel irreducible representations, the physical time-delays are its eigenvalues in the $s$-channel. A non-singlet exchange therefore recouples into the physical channels with both signs, inevitably producing a negative time-delay in at least one channel.
summary: 最近，有人提出，散射振幅的主要高能行为是普遍的，与电荷无关，从而将等效原理扩展到引力子极之外。在这封信中，我们通过研究有色散射的雷格极限，得出了对这种行为的更清晰的因果关系约束。通过 $s^{\alpha(t)}$ 和 $\alpha(0)=2-\delta$ 参数化轨迹，我们分析了不可约散射通道中的 Shapiro/Wigner--Smith 时滞。我们表明，任何 $\delta< 1/2$ 的非单线轨迹都会产生不断增长的符号不定时间延迟（$\delta=1/2$ 是边际的、尺寸相关的情况），这在弱重力状态下的 Regge 扩散区域中占主导地位。要点是，虽然 eikonal 相位自然地组织在 $t$ 通道不可约表示中，但物理时间延迟是其在 $s$ 通道中的特征值。因此，非单重交换重新耦合到具有两个符号的物理信道中，不可避免地在至少一个信道中产生负时延。

title: Characteristic Lightcone Sources in SO(1,3) Yang-Mills Theory
abstract: The SO(1,3)-symmetric reduction of Yang-Mills theory on Minkowski space yields a stress-energy tensor that is smooth on the timelike and spacelike Lorentz orbits but diverges on the lightcone that separates the two regions. We ask what consistent source this singularity represents. A natural cure is a real shift of the singular denominator. This does not regularize the source but instead moves the singular support onto a hyperboloid off the cone, where the corresponding source cannot remain both conserved and traceless. Our analysis shows that the displaced support cannot retain both properties, whereas a completion on the lightcone can. The matching condition fixes this completion up to one parameter $\chi$, which has a causal interpretation as the relative weight of the future and past cones. On regular constant-time slices, the completed source carries zero total four-momentum, so its physical content is a residual causal charge inferred from its curvature response.
summary: 杨-米尔斯理论在闵可夫斯基空间上的 SO(1,3) 对称约简产生了一个应力-能量张量，该张量在类时和类空洛伦兹轨道上是平滑的，但在分隔两个区域的光锥上发散。我们要问这个奇点代表了什么一致的来源。自然疗法是奇异分母的真正转变。这不会对源进行正则化，而是将奇异支撑移动到圆锥外的双曲面上，其中相应的源无法保持守恒和无痕。我们的分析表明，移位的支撑无法保留这两种特性，而光锥上的完成则可以。匹配条件将此完成固定为一个参数 $\chi$，该参数具有因果解释，即未来和过去锥体的相对权重。在规则的恒定时间切片上，完整的源携带零总四动量，因此其物理内容是从其曲率响应推断出的残余因果电荷。

title: Universal Lichnerowicz Lifting of Near-Horizon Soft Modes
abstract: A remarkable universality appears in the low-temperature quantum thermodynamics of near-extremal black holes, where distinct parent geometries often lead to the same logarithmic temperature dependence at one loop. In this work, we study the Lichnerowicz spectral origin of this infrared universality and understand why the relevant spectral data become insensitive to the details of the parent geometry. For extremal near-horizon geometries containing a two-dimensional maximally symmetric throat, we construct the normalizable transverse-traceless tensor zero modes associated with near-horizon reparametrizations. Turning on a small temperature lifts these zero modes through the first-order deformation of the Lichnerowicz operator. Although the local matrix element depends on detailed parent-geometry data, these data cancel after projection onto normalized tensor modes, leaving the universal result. For static spherically symmetric backgrounds, the eigenvalue shift is universally proportional to the Fourier mode number and temperature, and the same structure persists for rotating backgrounds, where angular warp factors only modify the overall projection factor. We further show that this lifted bulk spectrum is the Lichnerowicz realization of the Schwarzian soft sector. Thus, the universal first-order result is traced to an infrared bulk-boundary matching between near-horizon tensor zero modes and boundary reparametrization dynamics.
summary:
近极值黑洞的低温量子热力学出现了一种显着的普遍性，其中不同的母体几何形状通常会在一个循环中导致相同的对数温度依赖性。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种红外普遍性的 Lichnerowicz 光谱起源，并理解为什么相关光谱数据对父几何体的细节变得不敏感。对于包含二维最大对称喉部的极值近地平线几何形状，我们构造了与近地平线重参数化相关的可归一化横向无迹张量零模式。打开较小的温度会通过 Lichnerowicz 算子的一阶变形提升这些零模式。尽管局部矩阵元素取决于详细的父几何数据，但这些数据在投影到归一化张量模式后会取消，留下通用结果。对于静态球对称背景，特征值位移普遍与傅里叶模数和温度成正比，并且对于旋转背景也存在相同的结构，其中角度扭曲因子仅修改整体投影因子。

我们进一步表明，这个提升的整体谱是施瓦茨软扇区的利希纳罗维奇实现。因此，通用一阶结果可追溯到近地平线张量零模式与边界重参数化动力学之间的红外体边界匹配。

title: Laplace Space for Cosmological Correlators
abstract: Deep inside the horizon, every cosmological mode oscillates as a flat-space plane wave. A Laplace transform turns this fact into a general method: it resolves each curved-space mode into a superposition of plane waves dressed by a kernel that encodes the spacetime geometry, field content and dynamics, collapsing the time integrals onto flat-space ones. This provides simple diagrammatic rules that turn cosmological correlator diagrams into their flat-space counterparts integrated against Laplace-space kernels. On the paradigmatic massive single exchange, this integral representation makes the energy singularities manifest and evaluates in closed form as a single, rapidly convergent series valid throughout the kinematic domain, with no patching of separate expansions. The Laplace approach sheds conceptual and computational light on cosmological correlators in virtually any theory of the early universe.
summary: 在地平线深处，每种宇宙模式都以平坦空间平面波的形式振荡。拉普拉斯变换将这一事实转化为一种通用方法：它将每个弯曲空间模式解析为由编码时空几何、场内容和动力学的内核装饰的平面波的叠加，将时间积分折叠到平坦空间积分上。这提供了简单的图解规则，可将宇宙学相关图转换为针对拉普拉斯空间内核集成的平坦空间对应图。在典型的大规模单一交换中，这种积分表示使能量奇点显现出来，并以封闭形式评估为在整个运动学域中有效的单个、快速收敛的序列，而无需修补单独的扩展。拉普拉斯方法为几乎所有早期宇宙理论中的宇宙学相关器提供了概念和计算上的启发。

title: Massive Cosmological Correlators from Flat Space: a Laplace-Space Approach
abstract: We develop a new approach to cosmological correlators, built on a simple physical fact: deep inside the Hubble radius every mode oscillates as a flat-space plane wave, the curvature of spacetime making itself felt only as the mode is stretched towards the horizon. A Laplace transform turns this observation into a computational tool, resolving each curved-space mode function into a continuous superposition of plane waves labelled by a dual variable and dressed by a kernel that encodes the spacetime geometry, field content and dynamics. Every time integral then reduces to an elementary flat-space one, yielding simple diagrammatic rules for cosmological correlators. We illustrate the construction on the massive single-exchange correlator. The Laplace representation makes its total- and partial-energy singularities transparent ''from flat space'', and yields a single closed-form, rapidly convergent series valid throughout the entire kinematic domain. Although developed for conformally coupled fields exchanging massive scalars in de Sitter, the approach carries over essentially unchanged to virtually all situations of interest in primordial cosmology.
summary: 我们开发了一种宇宙学相关器的新方法，建立在一个简单的物理事实之上：在哈勃半径深处，每种模式都以平坦空间平面波的形式振荡，只有当模式向地平线延伸时，时空的曲率才会让人感觉到。拉普拉斯变换将这种观察结果转化为一种计算工具，将每个弯曲空间模式函数解析为由对偶变量标记的平面波的连续叠加，并由编码时空几何、场内容和动力学的内核修饰。每次积分都会简化为基本的平坦空间积分，从而为宇宙学相关器产生简单的图解规则。我们说明了大规模单交换相关器的构造。拉普拉斯表示使其总能量和部分能量奇点“从平坦空间”变得透明，并产生在整个运动学域中有效的单一封闭形式、快速收敛级数。尽管该方法是为在德西特中交换大量标量的共形耦合场而开发的，但该方法基本上没有改变地适用于原始宇宙学中几乎所有感兴趣的情况。

title: The IKKT renormalization group flow is IIB: toward zero-d holography
abstract: Supergravity solutions describing stacks of D$p$-branes with $p\neq 3$ feature a non-constant dilaton profile, which is holographically mapped to the running of the SYM coupling in $(p+1)$ dimensions. For D-instantons ($p=-1$), the lack of space and time in the IKKT matrix model makes such an interpretation difficult at first. In this letter, we propose a method to achieve this based on two closely related concepts: the IKKT method of integrating out heavy strings in a Coulomb branch vacuum and the matrix RG flow of Brézin and Zinn-Justin (BZJ). The notable difference between the two is that the BZJ RG flow also integrates over the Coulomb branch position. We first apply the Coulomb branch method and by relating the coefficient of the leading correction to the IKKT action with the string coupling, we can compute its dependence on the Coulomb branch position, finding a match between matrix theory and supergravity. Next, we apply the BZJ-flow to the IKKT partition function, which leads to a running of the coupling constant $g$ with the rank $N$ of the matrix model, reproducing the $N$-dependence of the axio-dilaton field in supergravity.
summary: 描述具有 $p\neq 3$ 的 D$p$-膜堆叠的超重力解决方案具有非常量膨胀剖面，该剖面全息映射到 $(p+1)$ 维度中 SYM 耦合的运行。对于 D 瞬间 ($p=-1$)，IKKT 矩阵模型中空间和时间的缺乏使得这种解释一开始很困难。在这封信中，我们提出了一种基于两个密切相关的概念来实现这一目标的方法：在库仑分支真空中积分重弦的 IKKT 方法以及 Brézin 和 Zinn-Justin (BZJ) 的矩阵 RG 流。两者之间的显着区别在于 BZJ RG 流也在库仑分支位置上积分。我们首先应用库仑分支方法，并通过将前导校正的系数与弦耦合的 IKKT 作用相关联，我们可以计算其对库仑分支位置的依赖性，找到矩阵理论和超重力之间的匹配。接下来，我们将 BZJ 流应用于 IKKT 配分函数，这导致耦合常数 $g$ 与矩阵模型的秩 $N$ 一起运行，再现超重力中轴膨胀场的 $N$ 依赖性。

title: Probing Probability Geometry with Schwinger--Dyson Identities: Score Mismatch, Fisher Information, and Configurational Temperature
abstract: We develop a geometric interpretation of Schwinger--Dyson identities by showing that their violations are controlled by a single score-mismatch field $\delta s$. For an arbitrary sampled probability distribution $Q$ and equilibrium measure $P_{\rm eq}$, every Schwinger--Dyson violation is determined by $\delta s = \nabla \log (Q / P_{\rm eq})$, which characterizes the departure from equilibrium. Each Schwinger--Dyson identity measures a projection of this field onto a probe direction in configuration space. The relative Fisher information is its squared norm. This gives a universal bound relating Fisher information to the complete Schwinger--Dyson hierarchy, thus implying that convergence in Fisher information restores all Schwinger--Dyson identities. We further obtain a variational characterization of the relative Fisher information in terms of Schwinger--Dyson violations, leading to a natural tomographic interpretation in which increasingly rich families of probe fields encode progressively more information about the underlying probability distortion. The configurational temperature, within this framework, emerges as a distinguished Schwinger--Dyson probe. The Stein operators and score-function methods arise naturally from the same probability-geometric structure. The score-mismatch field, therefore, provides a unified geometric language for understanding Schwinger--Dyson identities, configurational temperature, Fisher information, and non-equilibrium sampling in stochastic processes.
summary:
我们通过证明施温格-戴森恒等式的违规行为是由单个得分失配场 $\delta s$ 控制的，对施温格-戴森恒等式进行了几何解释。对于任意采样的概率分布 $Q$ 和均衡测度 $P_{\rm eq}$，每个 Schwinger-Dyson 违规都由 $\delta s = \nabla \log (Q / P_{\rm eq})$ 确定，它表征了偏离均衡的情况。每个施温格-戴森恒等式测量该场在配置空间中探测方向上的投影。相对费舍尔信息是其平方范数。这给出了将费舍尔信息与完整的施温格-戴森层次结构相关联的通用界限，从而意味着费舍尔信息的收敛恢复了所有施温格-戴森恒等式。我们进一步获得了施温格-戴森违规方面的相对费舍尔信息的变分特征，从而产生自然的断层摄影解释，其中越来越丰富的探测场系列逐渐编码更多关于潜在概率失真的信息。在这个框架内，构型温度作为杰出的施温格-戴森探针出现。

斯坦因算子和得分函数方法自然地源于相同的概率几何结构。因此，得分失配场为理解施温格-戴森恒等式、构型温度、费希尔信息和随机过程中的非平衡采样提供了统一的几何语言。

title: On Support Cardinality for Discrete Schrödinger Equation
abstract: How sparse can a nontrivial solution of a discrete Schrödinger equation be? In this note we study Dirichlet solutions on a finite $d$-dimensional lattice box, allowing an arbitrary real potential, and measure sparsity by the number of lattice sites at which the solution is nonzero (assuming it is nonzero at the origin). Our main result is a dimension-reduction principle: the minimal possible support size cannot decrease when the dimension increases. Consequently, any lower bound proved in dimension $d-1$ automatically yields the same lower bound in dimension $d$. As an application, we obtain a nearly sharp lower bound in four dimensions, matching the best-known two-dimensional constructions up to a logarithmic factor.
summary: 离散薛定谔方程的非平凡解可以有多稀疏？在本文中，我们研究有限 $d$ 维格盒上的狄利克雷解，允许任意实数势，并通过解非零的格点数量来测量稀疏性（假设它在原点非零）。我们的主要结果是降维原则：当维度增加时，最小可能的支撑尺寸不能减小。因此，在维度 $d-1$ 中证明的任何下界都会自动在维度 $d$ 中产生相同的下界。作为一个应用，我们在四个维度上获得了几乎尖锐的下界，将最著名的二维结构与对数因子相匹配。

title: The Colored Hofstadter Butterfly as a Many-Body Quantum Hall Phase Diagram
abstract: We prove that the colored Hofstadter butterfly has a many-body interpretation for a broad class of weakly interacting lattice fermion systems. Starting from a spectral gap of a Hofstadter-like one-particle Hamiltonian at arbitrary magnetic flux $b$, we construct an open region in the three-dimensional parameter space $(b,\mu,\lambda)$ of magnetic field, chemical potential, and interaction strength on which the infinite-volume interacting system has locally unique gapped ground states. The construction combines quasi-adiabatic continuation in the interaction strength with denominator-independent magnetic perturbation estimates, and therefore covers both commensurate and incommensurate fluxes, where no finite magnetic unit cell exists. On connected uniformly gapped regions meeting the non-interacting plane $\lambda=0$, we prove a many-body gap-labeling theorem: the Hall conductivity appearing in the macroscopic Ohm's law is constant and quantized, satisfying $2\pi\sigma^{\mathrm{H}}\in\mathbb{Z}$. Thus the integer colors of the non-interacting Hofstadter butterfly persist as Hall-conductivity labels of interacting quantum Hall phases.
summary: 我们证明彩色霍夫施塔特蝴蝶对一类广泛的弱相互作用晶格费米子系统具有多体解释。从任意磁通量 $b$ 处的类 Hofstadter 单粒子哈密顿量的谱带隙开始，我们在磁场、化学势和相互作用强度的三维参数空间 $(b,\mu,\lambda)$ 中构造一个开放区域，在该区域上无限体积相互作用系统具有局部唯一的带隙基态。该结构将相互作用强度中的准绝热连续性与分母无关的磁扰动估计相结合，因此涵盖了相称和不相称的通量，其中不存在有限磁晶胞。在满足非相互作用平面 $\lambda=0$ 的连通均匀带隙区域上，我们证明了多体带隙标记定理：宏观欧姆定律中出现的霍尔电导率是恒定且量子化的，满足 $2\pi\sigma^{\mathrm{H}}\in\mathbb{Z}$。因此，非相互作用霍夫施塔特蝴蝶的整数颜色持续作为相互作用量子霍尔相的霍尔电导率标签。

title: A new formulation of metriplectic dynamics with an application to quasigeostrophic ocean modeling with advected quantities
abstract: A general formulation of metriplectic dynamics is presented, where the metriplectic four-bracket is constructed by multiplying two skew-symmetric brackets. The new formulation is then used to introduce irreversibility in a generalized two-dimensional (2D) quasigeostrophic (QG) upper-ocean model involving advected quantities, with the thermal QG model as a special case. By construction, the resulting dynamics ensure the conservation of internal energy and the generation of entropy, in accordance with the first and second laws of thermodynamics. Our metriplectic dynamics formulation allows for a flexible specification of irreversibility, ranging from a type that results in nearly material conservation of potential vorticity to the representation of realistic forcing and dissipation in 2D QG ocean modeling with advected quantities.
summary: 提出了三折动力学的一般公式，其中三折四括号是通过两个斜对称括号相乘而构造的。然后，使用新公式在涉及平流量的广义二维 (2D) 准地转 (QG) 上层海洋模型中引入不可逆性，其中热 QG 模型作为特例。通过构造，所产生的动力学确保了内能守恒和熵的产生，符合热力学第一和第二定律。我们的三重动力学公式允许对不可逆性进行灵活的规范，范围从导致位涡量几乎材料守恒的类型到在具有平流量的 2D QG 海洋建模中表示现实的强迫和耗散。

title: Weak-Strong Resurgence Duality
abstract: We show that there is an explicit resurgent duality between weak and strong coupling expansions when one of the expansions has zero radius of convergence and the other has infinite radius of convergence. This complements the situation where the convergent expansion has finite radius of convergence, or when both expansions have zero radius of convergence. We illustrate this phenomenon for the Airy and Pearcey catastrophe integrals, and we apply it to two physical examples: the weak and strong coupling expansions of Dyson-Schwinger equations in zero-dimensional scalar $\phi^4$ theories, and the short and long time expansions of the heat kernel trace for the fluctuation operator of the kink-antikink crystal saddle configuration in the Gross-Neveu model.
summary: 我们证明，当一个展开的收敛半径为零而另一个展开的收敛半径无穷大时，弱耦合展开和强耦合展开之间存在明显的复活对偶性。这补充了收敛扩展具有有限收敛半径或两个扩展具有零收敛半径的情况。我们用艾里和皮尔西突变积分说明了这一现象，并将其应用于两个物理例子：零维标量 $\phi^4$ 理论中戴森-施温格方程的弱耦合展开式和强耦合展开式，以及 Gross-Neveu 模型中扭结-反扭结晶体鞍结构的涨落算子的热核迹的短时和长时间展开式。

title: Wave-Particle Decomposition for Kinetic Equations I: Theory and Numerics
abstract: This paper presents a wave-particle decomposition (WPD) for kinetic relaxation equations, formulated around a local evolution timescale and its associated kinetic horizon. By leveraging the characteristic integral solution, we decompose the distribution function into an analytically accumulated wave component and a purely kinetic particle component. The latter is defined by the collisionless transport that survives beyond a prescribed local domain of influence, termed the horizon. This continuous formulation yields a unified wave-particle system valid across the entire Knudsen spectrum, comprising a source-free total conservation law, a wave equation, and a particle equation. The wave operator admits a Chapman--Enskog expansion, whose moments yield Euler and Navier--Stokes fluxes with horizon-dependent coefficients, while the particle equation governs the remaining non-equilibrium kinetic transport. At the algorithmic level, this system is discretized by a conservative macro-micro method. The total conservative variables are advanced by a finite-volume update using the sum of a Navier--Stokes gas-kinetic wave flux and a particle flux computed by either a deterministic discrete-ordinate $(S_N)$ method or a Monte Carlo representation. Unlike the global time-step splitting in the unified gas-kinetic wave-particle (UGKWP) method, the present partition is defined at the PDE level and governed by the local ratio of evolution timescale to relaxation time. The particle component is therefore a fractional kinetic population generated by the collisionless factor of the integral solution. Formal analysis establishes the asymptotic-preserving continuum limit, rarefied-regime consistency, and regime-adaptive scaling of active kinetic degrees of freedom. Numerical tests in one, two, and three dimensions validate the accuracy, multiscale capability, and efficiency of the framework.
summary:
本文提出了动力学弛豫方程的波粒分解（WPD），围绕局部演化时间尺度及其相关的动力学视界制定。通过利用特征积分解，我们将分布函数分解为分析累积的波分量和纯动力学粒子分量。后者的定义是在规定的局部影响范围（称为地平线）之外生存的无碰撞运输。这种连续公式产生了一个在整个克努森谱上有效的统一波粒系统​​，包括无源总守恒定律、波动方程和粒子方程。波算子承认查普曼-恩斯科格展开式，其矩产生具有视界相关系数的欧拉和纳维-斯托克斯通量，而粒子方程则控制剩余的非平衡动力学输运。在算法层面，该系统采用保守的宏观微观方法进行离散化。

总保守变量通过有限体积更新来推进，该有限体积更新使用纳维-斯托克斯气体运动波通量和粒子通量之和，该粒子通量通过确定性离散坐标 $(S_N)$ 方法或蒙特卡罗表示计算。与统一气体运动波粒（UGKWP）方法中的全局时间步分裂不同，当前的分割是在偏微分方程水平上定义的，并由演化时间尺度与弛豫时间的局部比率控制。因此，粒子分量是由积分解的无碰撞因子生成的分数动力学总体。形式分析建立了渐进保持连续体极限、稀薄区域一致性以及主动动力学自由度的区域自适应缩放。一维、二维和三维数值测试验证了该框架的准确性、多尺度能力和效率。

title: Asymptotic solutions: glancing trajectories, Lagrangian singularities, and Bessel cylinders
abstract: We find a normal form for the simplest Lagrangian singularity appearing as the projection onto the space-energy of a solution to the Hamilton-Jacobi equation. Using this normal form we approximate asymptotic solutions of an equation $(\widehat{H}-E_0) \, u_h = f_h$ with a semiclassical distribution $f_h$ microlocalized on a Lagrangian manifold $\Lambda_0$ when $E_0$ is a critical value of the restriction $H|_{\Lambda_0}$.
summary: 我们找到了最简单的拉格朗日奇点的范式，它表现为汉密尔顿-雅可比方程解的空间能量上的投影。使用此范式，当 $E_0$ 是限制 $H|_{\Lambda_0}$ 的临界值时，我们近似方程 $(\widehat{H}-E_0) \, u_h = f_h$ 的渐近解，其半经典分布 $f_h$ 微局域于拉格朗日流形 $\Lambda_0$ 上。

title: The Ising Model Coupled to 2D Gravity: Critical Partition Function
abstract: We prove that the differential of the log of the partition function for the $2$-matrix model with quartic interactions converges in a certain double-scaling regime to the differential of the $\boldsymbol{\tau}$-function for the $(3,4)$ string equation.
